name: subtractive-ui
description: Reference-led frontend design, rendered UI audit, and behavior-preserving UI cleanup.

interface.longDescription: Subtractive UI helps Codex design, audit, and refactor frontend surfaces with a professional minimal process. It favors real rendered evidence, visual references, fewer controls, shorter copy, stable responsive layouts, and removal of implementation-detail UI.
defaultPrompt: Use Subtractive UI to audit or simplify this frontend.
